# stripe_invoice_item (Resource)

Invoice Items represent the component lines of an [invoice](https://docs.stripe.com/api/invoices). When you create an invoice item with an `invoice` field, it is attached to the specified invoice and included as [an invoice line item](https://docs.stripe.com/api/invoices/line_item) within [invoice.lines](https://docs.stripe.com/api/invoices/object#invoice_object-lines).

Invoice Items can be created before you are ready to actually send the invoice. This can be particularly useful when combined
with a [subscription](https://docs.stripe.com/api/subscriptions). Sometimes you want to add a charge or credit to a customer, but actually charge
or credit the customer's card only at the end of a regular billing cycle. This is useful for combining several charges
(to minimize per-transaction fees), or for having Stripe tabulate your usage-based billing totals.

Related guides: [Integrate with the Invoicing API](https://docs.stripe.com/invoicing/integration), [Subscription Invoices](https://docs.stripe.com/billing/invoices/subscription#adding-upcoming-invoice-items).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `amount` (Number, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Amount (in the `currency` specified) of the invoice item. This should always be equal to `unit_amount * quantity`.
- `currency` (String) Three-letter [ISO currency code](https://www.iso.org/iso-4217-currency-codes.html), in lowercase. Must be a [supported currency](https://stripe.com/docs/currencies).
- `customer` (String) The ID of the customer to bill for this invoice item.
- `description` (String) An arbitrary string attached to the object. Often useful for displaying to users.
- `discountable` (Boolean) If true, discounts will apply to this invoice item. Always false for prorations.
- `discounts` (Attributes List) The discounts which apply to the invoice item. Item discounts are applied before invoice discounts. Use `expand[]=discounts` to expand each discount. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--discounts))
- `invoice` (String) The ID of the invoice this invoice item belongs to.
- `metadata` (Map of String) Set of [key-value pairs](https://docs.stripe.com/api/metadata) that you can attach to an object. This can be useful for storing additional information about the object in a structured format.
- `period` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--period))
- `price_data` (Attributes, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Data used to generate a new [Price](https://docs.stripe.com/api/prices) object inline. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--price_data))
- `pricing` (Attributes, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) The pricing information of the invoice item. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pricing))
- `quantity` (Number) Quantity of units for the invoice item in integer format, with any decimal precision truncated. For the item's full-precision decimal quantity, use `quantity_decimal`. This field will be deprecated in favor of `quantity_decimal` in a future version. If the invoice item is a proration, the quantity of the subscription that the proration was computed for.
- `quantity_decimal` (Number, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Non-negative decimal with at most 12 decimal places. The quantity of units for the invoice item.
- `subscription` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) The ID of a subscription to add this invoice item to. When left blank, the invoice item is added to the next upcoming scheduled invoice. When set, scheduled invoices for subscriptions other than the specified subscription will ignore the invoice item. Use this when you want to express that an invoice item has been accrued within the context of a particular subscription.
- `tax_behavior` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Only required if a [default tax behavior](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/products-prices-tax-categories-tax-behavior#setting-a-default-tax-behavior-(recommended)) was not provided in the Stripe Tax settings. Specifies whether the price is considered inclusive of taxes or exclusive of taxes. One of `inclusive`, `exclusive`, or `unspecified`. Once specified as either `inclusive` or `exclusive`, it cannot be changed.
- `tax_code` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) A [tax code](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/tax-categories) ID.
- `tax_rates` (List of String) The tax rates which apply to the invoice item. When set, the `default_tax_rates` on the invoice do not apply to this invoice item.
- `unit_amount_decimal` (Number, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) The decimal unit amount in cents (or local equivalent) of the charge to be applied to the upcoming invoice. This `unit_amount_decimal` will be multiplied by the quantity to get the full amount. Passing in a negative `unit_amount_decimal` will reduce the `amount_due` on the invoice. Accepts at most 12 decimal places.

### Read-Only

- `date` (Number) Time at which the object was created. Measured in seconds since the Unix epoch.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the object.
- `livemode` (Boolean) If the object exists in live mode, the value is `true`. If the object exists in test mode, the value is `false`.
- `object` (String) String representing the object's type. Objects of the same type share the same value.
- `parent` (Attributes) The parent that generated this invoice item. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--parent))
- `proration` (Boolean) Whether the invoice item was created automatically as a proration adjustment when the customer switched plans.
- `proration_details` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--proration_details))
- `test_clock` (String) ID of the test clock this invoice item belongs to.

<a id="nestedatt--discounts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `discounts`

Optional:

- `coupon` (String) ID of the coupon to create a new discount for.
- `discount` (String) ID of an existing discount on the object (or one of its ancestors) to reuse.
- `promotion_code` (String) ID of the promotion code to create a new discount for.


<a id="nestedatt--period"></a>
### Nested Schema for `period`

Required:

- `end` (Number) The end of the period, which must be greater than or equal to the start. This value is inclusive.
- `start` (Number) The start of the period. This value is inclusive.


<a id="nestedatt--price_data"></a>
### Nested Schema for `price_data`

Required:

- `currency` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Three-letter [ISO currency code](https://www.iso.org/iso-4217-currency-codes.html), in lowercase. Must be a [supported currency](https://stripe.com/docs/currencies).
- `product` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) The ID of the [Product](https://docs.stripe.com/api/products) that this [Price](https://docs.stripe.com/api/prices) will belong to.

Optional:

- `tax_behavior` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Only required if a [default tax behavior](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/products-prices-tax-categories-tax-behavior#setting-a-default-tax-behavior-(recommended)) was not provided in the Stripe Tax settings. Specifies whether the price is considered inclusive of taxes or exclusive of taxes. One of `inclusive`, `exclusive`, or `unspecified`. Once specified as either `inclusive` or `exclusive`, it cannot be changed.
- `unit_amount` (Number, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) A positive integer in cents (or local equivalent) (or 0 for a free price) representing how much to charge.
- `unit_amount_decimal` (Number, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Same as `unit_amount`, but accepts a decimal value in cents (or local equivalent) with at most 12 decimal places. Only one of `unit_amount` and `unit_amount_decimal` can be set.


<a id="nestedatt--pricing"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pricing`

Optional:

- `price` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) The ID of the price object.
- `price_details` (Attributes, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pricing--price_details))
- `type` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) The type of the pricing details.
- `unit_amount_decimal` (Number, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) The unit amount (in the `currency` specified) of the item which contains a decimal value with at most 12 decimal places.

<a id="nestedatt--pricing--price_details"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pricing.price_details`

Optional:

- `price` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) The ID of the price this item is associated with.
- `product` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) The ID of the product this item is associated with.



<a id="nestedatt--parent"></a>
### Nested Schema for `parent`

Read-Only:

- `subscription_details` (Attributes) Details about the subscription that generated this invoice item (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--parent--subscription_details))
- `type` (String) The type of parent that generated this invoice item

<a id="nestedatt--parent--subscription_details"></a>
### Nested Schema for `parent.subscription_details`

Read-Only:

- `subscription` (String) The subscription that generated this invoice item
- `subscription_item` (String) The subscription item that generated this invoice item



<a id="nestedatt--proration_details"></a>
### Nested Schema for `proration_details`

Read-Only:

- `credited_items` (Attributes) For a credit proration, links to the debit invoice line items or invoice item that the credit applies to. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--proration_details--credited_items))
- `discount_amounts` (Attributes List) Discount amounts applied when the proration was created. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--proration_details--discount_amounts))

<a id="nestedatt--proration_details--credited_items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `proration_details.credited_items`

Read-Only:

- `invoice_item` (String) When `type` is `invoice_item`, the invoice item id for the debited invoice item corresponding to this credit proration.
- `invoice_line_item_details` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--proration_details--credited_items--invoice_line_item_details))
- `type` (String) Whether the credit references a pending invoice item or one or more invoice line items on an invoice.

<a id="nestedatt--proration_details--credited_items--invoice_line_item_details"></a>
### Nested Schema for `proration_details.credited_items.invoice_line_item_details`

Read-Only:

- `invoice` (String) The invoice id for the debited line item(s).
- `invoice_line_items` (List of String) IDs of the debited invoice line item(s) on the invoice that correspond to the credit proration.



<a id="nestedatt--proration_details--discount_amounts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `proration_details.discount_amounts`

Read-Only:

- `amount` (Number) The amount, in cents (or local equivalent), of the discount.
- `discount` (String) The discount that was applied to get this discount amount.
